arts.ttl: 19 best photos as Celtic fans descend on Dortmund to kick off city centre party ahead of Champions League clash
arts.sum: The Hoops legions have descended on Germany in their thousands before the massive European game

arts.ttl: Darren O'Dea shares exactly where 'fantastic' Celtic start under Brendan Rodgers has stemmed from
arts.sum: Celtic have been imperious under Brendan Rodgers this season, and there seems to be no stopping the Scottish Premiership champions in domestic action. “Anyone who has been in pre-season knows you can’t judge too much off it and you are nervous that because things were going so well, are we missing something here?

arts.ttl: Who sang ‘You’ll Never Walk Alone’ first: Liverpool, Celtic or Borussia Dortmund? Origins and history
arts.sum: Curiously, Liverpool won the tie 2-1 and booked their place in their first European final where they would meet Borussia Dortmund - the only other club that has adopted You’ll Never Walk Alone – in the mid-90s. It is believed that Celtic supporters first started singing You’ll Never Walk Alone after a European Cup Winners’ Cup semi-final tie against Liverpool on 19 April 1966 .

arts.ttl: Luis Palma 'makes decision' on Celtic future after summit as £13.3m January transfer splurge gets green light
arts.sum: The winger has struggled for regular game time so far this season

arts.ttl: The Champions League 'guest' Darren O'Dea invited to check on two Celtic players in win vs Slovan Bratislava
arts.sum: And speaking about the Irish players in Celtic’s team, the Player Pathway Manager said he invited John O’Shea to cast his eye over Adam Idah and Liam Scales for the upcoming Republic of Ireland internationals this month. Celtic currently sit second in the league to Bayern Munich on goal difference after their impressive 5-1 win over Slovan Bratislava on matchday one that left pundits and former players waxing lyrical over Rodgers’ team.

arts.ttl: Paulo Bernardo's classy response about Celtic midfield competition and Arne Engels' quality
arts.sum: Paulo Bernardo’s midfield competition with Arne Engels and Reo Hatate Bernardo labelled Engels as a ‘great player’ and insisted that he doesn’t need motivation from the player and ‘we can only get better with each other’, as he told The Celtic Way .

arts.ttl: Alan Pardew nails it with a realistic view about 'outstanding' Celtic in the Champions League
arts.sum: But Pardew also delivered a healthy dose of realism in terms of the financial gulf between Celtic and the rest of the top European clubs. And when Pardew was informed about Celtic’s financial gap compared to Rangers, the former West Ham boss said that the cash being generated in this season’s competition is only going to benefit the bigger teams in the competition still.

arts.ttl: Derek Rae uses two German words to tell Celtic about Borussia Dortmund's 'deficiencies'
arts.sum: But now, Rae has said that Dortmund’s ‘brittle’ defence could offer Celtic hope of taking something from Germany back to Glasgow tonight. The build-up to Celtic’s big Champions League game against Borussia Dortmund continues as the clock ticks ever closer to kick-off in the Westenfallonstadion tonight.

arts.ttl: Andres Iniesta's glowing Celtic tribute as Spanish footballing icon announces plan to retire
arts.sum: One of the game's most celebrated players has announced that he will hang up his boots for good next week at the age of 40

arts.ttl: Aiden McGeady leaves Ayr United as former Celtic and Hibs star rips up deal with Scott Brown's team
arts.sum: McGeady has ripped up his deal having not played under his former teammate Brown this season
